src: 53AI Hub is an open-source AI portal, which enables you to quickly build a operational-level AI portal to launch and operate AI agents, prompts, and AI tools. It supports seamless integration with development platforms like Coze, Dify, FastGPT, RAGFlow.
ja: 53AI Hubはオープンソースのai portal。運用レベルのAIポータルを素早く構築し、AI agent、プロンプト、AIツールを公開・運用可能。Coze、Dify、FastGPT、RAGFlowなどの開発プラットフォームとシームレスに連携
